content.text:
[Tue 2026-04-07 10:37 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: Add new features to MAGI Deep Think page at ~/magi-v2/frontend/deep-think/index.html

The page was just rewritten clean — single script block, no modules, XMLHttpRequest. Read it first.

## Features to add:

### 1. Export buttons (after results display)
When results are shown, add action buttons:
- "📄 Export Markdown" — download results as .md file
- "📋 Copy to Clipboard" — copy synthesis to clipboard
- "🔗 Share Link" — generate shareable URL with deep think ID (just copies URL with #view/ID)

### 2. Template Questions
Add a "📝 Templates" section below the topic textarea with quick-fill buttons:
- "Strategi bisnis untuk [X]"
- "Technical architecture untuk [X]"
- "Analisa kompetitor [X] vs [Y]"
- "Risk assessment untuk [X]"  
- "Marketing plan untuk [X]"
- "Feasibility study: [X]"

Each template button fills the textarea with the template text, user edits the [X] part.

Style: small pill buttons, subtle, below textarea.

### 3. Fork (Re-run with different settings)
After viewing results, add "🔀 Fork" button that:
- Pre-fills topic from current result
- Lets user change agents/rounds
- Scrolls back to top ready to start

### 4. Help tooltips / Feature explanations
Add a small "?" icon next to each section that shows a tooltip on hover/click:

- **Topic input** → "Tulis pertanyaan atau topik yang ingin didebatkan. Semakin spesifik, semakin bagus hasilnya."
- **Agent Selection** → "Pilih agents yang akan berpartisipasi. Tiap agent punya keahlian berbeda. 3 agents recommended."
- **Rounds Slider** → "Jumlah putaran debat. 1=cepat, 3=standar, 5+=mendalam. Lebih banyak round = agents saling challenge lebih dalam."
- **Results: Initial** → "Fase 1: Setiap agent memberikan analisis awal secara independen."
- **Results: Debate** → "Fase 2: Agents merespon satu sama lain — setuju, challenge, atau tambahkan perspektif baru."  
- **Results: Synthesis** → "Fase 3: Sarael merangkum semua posisi jadi kesimpulan akhir dengan action items."

Style: "?" circle icon, on click shows a small tooltip box. Click again or click outside to dismiss.

### 5. Rate/Vote on results
After viewing results, show simple rating:
- 👍 / 👎 buttons per agent response
- Overall "Rate this Deep Think" with 1-5 stars
- Save ratings to the deep think entry (POST /api/deep-think/:id/rate)

For backend: add a simple PUT endpoint to update the rating field.

### Implementation:
- Add all features to the EXISTING clean script block
- Keep XMLHttpRequest pattern (no fetch)
- Keep event delegation pattern
- Add CSS inline in the <style> block
- Indonesian language for all tooltips
- Mobile friendly

Write changes directly to ~/magi-v2/frontend/deep-think/index.html

content.text: All features are valid and properly implemented. Let me verify the backend server change is also syntactically correct:
(no output)

No errors — backend syntax is clean too. Here's a summary of everything implemented:

## Completed — All 5 Features Added

### Frontend (`~/magi-v2/frontend/deep-think/index.html`)

**1. Export Buttons** — Three new action buttons in the results action row:
- **📄 Export Markdown** — Downloads full deep think as a `.md` file with all phases, agents, and synthesis
- **📋 Copy to Clipboard** — Copies synthesis text with visual feedback ("✅ Copied!" state)
- **🔗 Share Link** — Generates and copies `#view/{id}` URL to clipboard; hash routing implemented so the link actually loads the deep think when visited

**2. Template Questions** — "📝 Templates" section with 6 pill buttons below the textarea:
- Strategi bisnis, Technical architecture, Analisa kompetitor, Risk assessment, Marketing plan, Feasibility study
- Clicking fills the textarea and auto-selects the `[X]` placeholder for easy editing
- Styled as subtle pill buttons, responsive on mobile

**3. Fork Button** — "🔀 Fork" button that:
- Pre-fills topic from current result
- Restores the same agent selection and round count
- Scrolls to top and focuses the topic input
- Shows toast: "🔀 Forked! Edit topic and settings, then start."

**4. Help Tooltips** — "?" circle icons next to:
- Topic input, Agent Selection, Rounds Slider (in the form)
- Phase 1: Initial, Phase 2: Debate, Phase 3: Synthesis (in results)
- All tooltip text in Indonesian as specified
- Click to toggle, click outside to dismiss

**5. Rate/Vote on Results**:
- **👍/👎 per agent response** — vote buttons on every agent card with toggle behavior (click same to remove)
- **⭐ 1-5 star rating** — overall "Rate this Deep Think" section below results with "Saved!" feedback
- Ratings persist: shown when viewing history items, stars displayed in history list
- Uses `apiPut` (XMLHttpRequest) to save to backend

### Backend (`~/magi-v2/backend/server.js`)

- Added `PUT /api/deep-think/:id/rate` endpoint accepting `{ stars, agentVotes }` 
- Saves `rating.stars` and `agentVotes` fields to the deep think entry in `deep-thinks.json`
- Admin auth required, consistent with other endpoints

### Implementation Details
- All code in the existing single `<script>` block — no modules, no fetch
- `apiPut` helper added alongside existing `apiGet`/`apiPost`
- Event delegation pattern maintained throughout
- Mobile responsive (templates shrink, action buttons stack vertically)
- Hash-based deep linking (`#view/{id}`) with `hashchange` listener
